introSection: High Frolics was a wooden roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It operated from 1918 to 1940.

sections.title: Renovation
sections.content: In 1933, Leap Frog Railway was renovated and renamed High Frolics.

fullText:
High Frolics was a wooden roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It operated from 1918 to 1940.

In 1933, Leap Frog Railway was renovated and renamed High Frolics.
